segments.speaker: 题目6/7
segments.text: Listen to a conversation. My schoolwork is really stressing me out. Have you considered trying yoga? My sister's taking a yoga class and says it's great for stress. I haven't. But if it sounds like a good idea, do you know where I might start? Have you done yoga yourself? I haven't, but I know there are lots of classes for beginners. You should really also think about taking vacation during spring break. When's the last time you went . anywhere for fun? Thanks, but I like the yoga idea better. Don't you find out where your sister attends her class and let me know.
